inputs.label: Passband Ripple (dB)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum ripple in the passband (Ap). Must be >0.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum ripple in the passband (Ap). Must be >0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale Welligkeit im Durchlassbereich (Ap). Muss >0 sein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ondulation maximale dans la bande passante (Ap). Doit être > 0.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rizado máximo en la banda de paso (Ap). Debe ser >0.

inputs.label: Stopband Attenuation (dB)
inputs.businessContext: Minimum attenuation required in the stopband (As). Must be > passbandRipple.

businessContext_i18n.en: Minimum attenuation required in the stopband (As). Must be > passbandRipple.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Durdurma bandında gereken minimum zayıflama (As). geçişBandıDalgalanması'ndan büyük olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mindestdämpfung im Sperrbereich (As). Muss > Durchlassbereichswelligkeit sein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Atténuation minimale requise dans la bande atténuée (As). Doit être > ondulationBandePassante.
businessContext_i18n.es: Atenuación mínima requerida en la banda de parada (As). Debe ser > rizadoBandaPaso.

inputs.label: Cutoff Frequency (Hz)
inputs.businessContext: Passband edge frequency (wp). For low-pass prototype, must be < stopbandFrequency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Passband edge frequency (wp). For low-pass prototype, must be < stopbandFrequency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geçiş bandı kenar frekansı (wp). Alçak geçiren prototip için durdurmaBandıFrekansı'ndan küçük olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchlassbereichsgrenzfrequenz (wp). Für Tiefpass-Prototyp muss < Sperrbereichsfrequenz sein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence de bord de la bande passante (wp). Pour un prototype passe-bas, doit être < fréquenceBandeAtténuée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia del borde de la banda de paso (wp). Para prototipo paso bajo, debe ser < frecuenciaBandaParada.

inputs.label: Stopband Frequency (Hz)
inputs.businessContext: Stopband edge frequency (ws). Must be > cutoffFrequency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Stopband edge frequency (ws). Must be > cutoffFrequency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Durdurma bandı kenar frekansı (ws). kesimFrekansı'ndan büyük olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence de bord de la bande atténuée (ws). Doit être > fréquenceCoupure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia del borde de la banda de parada (ws). Debe ser > frecuenciaCorte.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
